name: Kerbal Space Program
description: In Kerbal Space Program, take charge of the space program for the alien race known as the Kerbals. You have access to an array of parts to assemble fully-functional spacecraft that flies (or doesn’t) based on realistic aerodynamic and orbital physics.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *:Windows 7 SP1+
  • Processor:Core 2 Duo 2.0 Ghz
  • Memory:4 GB RAM
  • Graphics:DX10 (SM 4.0) capable, 512MB VRAM
  • Hard Drive:3 GB HD space
comment1: I liked seeing the Mun whizz past at 0.1 c after I slightly miscalculated the required orbital velocity
comment2: I felt like a nerd but I successfully landed on minmus, duna, the mun, and moho with a scientist and jebediah using a command module and lander design. I also created a space station and multiple relay satellites. Tis peak mi lord
comment3: If u dont rescue jebediah from that planet u left him on then your playing the game wrong and p diddy is gunna touch u in ur sleep
